title: B.Com (Hons. with Research) Financial Markets
content: *4-year Undergraduate Degree (Honours with Research) S. No. | Broad Category of Course | Minimum Credit Requirement for a4-Year UG Programme | 1 | Major (Core) | 80 | 2 | Minor Stream | 32 | 3 | Multidisciplinary | 09 | 4 | Ability Enhancement Courses (AEC) | 08 | 5 | Skill Enhancement Courses (SEC) | 09 | 6 | Value Added Courses common for all UG | 06-08 | 7 | Summer Internship | 02-04 | 8 | Research Project/ Dissertation | 12 | 9 | Total | 160 | 4-year UG Degree with Honours (Source: - UGC Curriculum & Credit Framework for Undergraduate Programmes) XII with minimum 50% marks aggregate and Mathematics/Commerce as a subject in XII level Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Com (Hons/Hons with Research) Financial Markets Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or equivalent 2) 50% or above in best four relevant subjects at XII level 01 Apply the knowledge of Accounting and Finance to solve real life business issues. 02 03 Analyze and interpret financial and non-financial information for Business Decision making 04 05 06 07 08 Imbibe professional ethics related to financial management practices. 09 Communicate effectively with business community and with society at large. 10 Explore business problems from an entrepreneurial perspective 01 02 03 Graduates will pursue lifelong learning in generating innovative solutions. 01 Make students ready for the self -employment and also for other career opportunities like Stock Broker, Investment Banker, Financial Advisor etc. 02 Develop and aware students to explore opportunities in the field of investment and share market. 03 Students can pursue higher education in the field of stock trading, finance & amp; risk management. XII with minimum 50% marks aggregate and Mathematics/Commerce as a subject in XII level Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Com (Hons/Hons with Research) Financial Markets Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or equivalent 2) 50% or above in best four relevant subjects at XII level
